title: hymenophyllum prionema
intro: Hymenophyllum prionema, also known as the club fern, is a type of epiphytic fern native to New Zealand. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum prionema include treating wounds, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
